message_list_observation: Observe only visible matches and chats.
Use a stable candidate_key based on visible name, row position, and preview hash.
thread_observation: Open the candidate thread before drafting.
Separate old visible context from latest inbound messages.
stage_send_verification: Prefer paste over direct Chinese typing.
Verify the staged input text exactly.
post_send_verification: Use a fresh observation after send; unknown if no sent bubble is visible.
known_gui_pitfalls: App-specific prompts or timers may appear; treat popups as exception_state and stop.
